Blood 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 blood mana to play this card.)[/i]
When Deoth Hemo enters play or is destroyed, you gain 2 health.

Bone 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 bone mana to play this card.)[/i]
When Deoth Necro enters play or is destroyed, each opponent discards a card.

Mind 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 mind mana to play this card.)[/i]
When Deoth Psyche enters play or is destroyed, draw a card.

As an additional cost to play this card, destroy a card you control named  “Deoth Hemo”, a card you control named “Deoth Necro”, a card you control named “Deoth Psyche”, and a card named “Deoth Spectra”.
When The Deoth Quadrutum enters, reveal all of your zones and void all silver cards in all zones revealed this way.
When The Deoth Quadrutum leaves play, put all silver cards voided with it into your discard.
{0}: Add one mana of any type.

Soul 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 soul mana to play this card.)[/i]
When Deoth Spectra enters play or is destroyed, attack 2. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 2 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 2 endurance counter from it.)[/i]
Each player discards a card, then draws a card.
